calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Purchase Of Asset, Modifying Trust To Permit Concentration In Real Estate Investments, And Confirming Appointment
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Debra Kasper for Wells Fargo Bank and Steve Hazen (Trustees).

The Court informed Ms. Hazen that it is not attracted to the Court concluding that investing in this property is a prudent investment. Ms. Kasper stated that they want this to be a Family vacation home, that they prefer not to have to modify the taxes and that all risk of tax issues are on the Settlor of the Trust. The Court granted the Petition for An Order Approving Purchase of Asset, etc. in so far as it seeks to modify the Trust to allow the Trustee to acquire this property according to the language as provided in the supplement. (subject to receipt and review of a revised order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Approving Purchase Of Asset, Modifying Trust To Permit Concentration In Real Estate Investments, And Confirming Appointment
Off Calendar Nov-26-2012 Continued To Dec-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
